description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth, glossy white icing covering the top and sides. The cake is decorated with elegant swirls and dots of dark chocolate, creating a visually appealing pattern across the surface. The cake is pre-sliced into several even portions, with the slice lines clearly visible. The sides reveal a layered structure, with a gradient of chocolate and cream-colored cake and mousse, suggesting a rich, multi-flavored interior. A small chocolate plaque with the word 'MIREL' is placed on top as a decorative accent. The cake sits directly on a flat surface with no visible plate or tray.
description: A round, single-tier cake with glossy white icing, chocolate swirl decorations, and visible layered interior. Pre-sliced and topped with a chocolate plaque.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake's layered side and the chocolate swirl design on top, with slice lines and a partial view of the chocolate plaque.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the chocolate swirl and dot decorations, with the cake's layered structure and slice lines clearly visible.
description_view_2: The 'MIREL' chocolate plaque is most prominent in this view, along with the swirl design and the cake's layered side.
description_view_3: This view shows the chocolate plaque at an angle, the swirl design, and the cake's layered side with visible slice lines.
